rationale: Educ. Code §25.004 addresses tuition prohibition for military dependents in tax-exempt military housing. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: A school district may not charge tuition for the attendance of a student who is domiciled in another state and resides in military housing that is located in the district but is exempt from taxation by the district.
_note: No direct conflict. The rule references tax-exempt military housing, not the residence homestead exemption.
